title: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters
content:
Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters

⸻

Letter for Jessie Birdsong-Pedigo

Dear Jessie,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. I appreciate the effort and thought you put into both, and you’ve done a solid job of aligning your materials with the role you’re seeking. Below are my thoughts on each.

Your cover letter does a great job of demonstrating your passion for game design and your familiarity with Naughty Dog’s work. You provide specific examples of your experience, particularly referencing your own projects and how they align with the company’s work. However, there’s an incomplete sentence near the end that disrupts the flow. Be sure to proofread carefully to ensure clarity. Also, while your experience speaks for itself, you could make a stronger closing statement about how you’d contribute to their team.

Your resume is well-structured and clearly conveys your background, experience, and skills. Your independent game development work is impressive, and your internship at Epic Games adds credibility to your technical ability. One area for improvement is the way you present your work experience—adding more quantifiable achievements (such as specific sales numbers, downloads, or awards) would help demonstrate impact. Also, ensure consistent formatting, particularly in spacing and punctuation within your bullet points.
